entities.name: Reflection Pipeline
entities.context: A systematic process for recording and processing voice memos.

entities.name: voice memo
entities.context: A recording method used to capture audio notes.

entities.name: auto-transcribed
entities.context: A feature that converts spoken language into written text.

entities.name: summary
entities.context: A concise overview of the recorded content.

entities.name: detailed recap
entities.context: An in-depth review of the recorded content.

entities.name: insights
entities.context: Key takeaways or learnings from the content.

entities.name: Knowledge/
entities.context: A storage location for recorded and processed information.

relationships.context: Voice memos are processed through auto-transcription.
Auto-transcribed content generates a detailed recap.
The summary is stored in the Knowledge/ repository.
The detailed recap is stored in the Knowledge/ repository.
Insights are stored in the Knowledge/ repository.
